name: Incognia
description: Incognia provides mobile device intelligence combining device, location and tamper signals to detect fraud, account takeovers and fake accounts with low false positives, exposed via API and SDK.

seo.title: Incognia — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Incognia: Incognia provides mobile device intelligence combining device, location and tamper signals to detect fraud, account takeovers and fake accounts with l

when_to_use: Location and device intelligence for mobile account takeover
Fake account detection using tamper signal analysis
Low-friction re-authentication via trusted device location
GPS spoofing and emulator detection for mobile fraud
Device risk scoring for account opening fraud prevention

pros: Device and location signals cut fake accounts
Low false positive rates on mobile flows
SDK plus API suits native mobile apps
Strong anti-ATO signals without extra friction
cons: Mobile-first, less useful for web-only products
Requires SDK integration, not just API calls
Location signals raise privacy and consent questions
Not a replacement for document or sanctions checks
review.verdict: Best-in-class mobile device intelligence for fraud; pair it with a real KYC stack for compliance.
review.best_for: Mobile-first fintech and marketplace apps fighting account takeovers and fake account farms
review.not_for: Web-only products or teams needing document, sanctions and full KYC from one vendor

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
